_comment: Centrally-managed per-repo Checkov exceptions. All entries require SWG approval With a Confluence link to the meeting minutes. Use skip_check to exclude the check entirely. Use soft_fail_on allows it through even if it's HIGH or CRITICAL but still shows in the output.
_global_skip_check_comment: Checks skipped for every repo, org-wide. Still requires SWG approval and a documented justification per check.

global_skip_check.justification: TODO: Link to SWG Confluence page
